title: In-house script for assessing the risk subgroup of stem cells
author: Ma, Fei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The two in-house scripts, titled "RandomSelectCellsAndHVG2000Exp.pl" and "add_typeToinput.pl," were utilized in the protocol article "Assessing the Risk Subgroup of Stem Cells," slated for publication in the STAR Protocol journal. The former script was employed to randomly select 70% of the cells from each subset of the A2105C2P5 and A2105C3P5 samples to form the training set, while the latter was employed to assign labels to the pro- and non-embolic cells in both the training and test sets.
steps_raw: The two in-house scripts, titled "RandomSelectCellsAndHVG2000Exp.pl" and "add_typeToinput.pl," were utilized in the protocol article "Assessing the Risk Subgroup of Stem Cells," slated for publication in the STAR Protocol journal. The former script was employed to randomly select 70% of the cells from each subset of the A2105C2P5 and A2105C3P5 samples to form the training set, while the latter was employed to assign labels to the pro- and non-embolic cells in both the training and test sets.
